2606.27967.title: RelBall: Relation Ball with Quaternion Rotation for Knowledge Graph Completion
2606.27967.paper_summary: Real-world knowledge graphs are often incomplete, lacking many valid facts. Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC) aims to predict missing links using known triples, thereby enhancing graph coverage. A key challenge is modeling diverse relational patterns such as symmetry, antisymmetry, inversion, composition and semantic hierarchy. Existing models such as RotatE can capture symmetric, antisymmetric, inverse, and commutative composition patterns, yet struggle with non-commutative composition. Rotate3D addresses this by introducing non-commutativity via three-dimensional rotations, but still fails to capture the semantic hierarchies prevalent in knowledge graphs. Moreover, both models cannot effectively model one-to-many relations. To overcome these limitations, we propose RelBall, which extends Rotate3D with two innovations. First, our model introduces modulus transformation to model hierarchies, driving abstract concepts toward smaller moduli and concrete instances toward larger ones. Second, it introduces a tail-centric relation ball to model one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-one, and many-to-many relations. RelBall offers the following advantages: (1) coverage of all relational patterns, including the ones mentioned above; (2) an interpretable hierarchical representation where the modulus directly reflect semantic levels; (3) support for one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-one, and many-to-many relations. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate RelBall's competitive link prediction performance against various baselines.
2606.27967.paper_summary_zh: 現實世界的知識圖譜往往是不完整的，缺乏許多有效的事實。知識圖譜補全（KGC）的目標是利用已知的三元組來預測缺失的連結，從而增強圖譜的覆蓋範圍。一個主要挑戰是建模多樣的關係模式，例如對稱性、反對稱性、反轉、組合以及語義層級。現有模型如RotatE能夠捕捉對稱、反對稱、反向和可交換的組合模式，但在非可交換組合方面仍然存在困難。Rotate3D通過引入三維旋轉來解決這一問題，從而引入非可交換性，但仍然無法捕捉知識圖譜中普遍存在的語義層級。此外，這兩個模型都無法有效建模一對多的關係。為了克服這些限制，我們提出了RelBall，這是一種通過兩項創新擴展Rotate3D的模型。首先，我們的模型引入模數變換來建模層級，將抽象概念推向較小的模數，將具體實例推向較大的模數。其次，它引入了一個以尾部為中心的關係球來建模一對一、一對多、多對一和多對多的關係。RelBall提供以下優勢：（1）涵蓋所有關係模式，包括上述提到的模式；（2）可解釋的層級表示，其中模數直接反映語義層次；（3）支持一對一、一對多、多對一和多對多的關係。在多個數據集上的實驗顯示，RelBall在連結預測性能上與各種基準相比具有競爭力。
2606.27967.author: Yike Liu et.al.
2606.27967.authors: Yike Liu, Peijia Xie, Chao He, Huiling Zhu
